metadata.title: Tag Wrangler
metadata.description: Rename, merge, toggle, and search tags from the tag pane

regex.source: This cannot be undone. Do you wish to proceed?`
regex.target: 这 不能 撤销。 你想继续吗？`

regex.source: WARNING: No Undo!,`Renaming ${t} to ${n} will merge ${s.canonical===t.canonical?"these tags":`multiple tags
regex.target: 警告: 无法撤消！,`重命名 ${t} 到 ${n} 将合并 ${s.canonical===t.canonical?"这些标签":`multiple tags

regex.source: `Renaming #${s} (and any sub-tags)`,`Enter new name (must be a valid Obsidian tag):
regex.target: `重命名 #${s} (以及任何子标签)`,`输入新名称 (必须是有效的Obsidian标签):

regex.source: .setContent(`Enter new name (must be a valid Obsidian tag name)
regex.target: .setContent(`输入新名称 (必须是有效的 Obsidian 标签名称)
.Notice(`活动 ${f.aborted?"终止":""}: ${p} 个文件已更新`)

regex.source: .onInvalidEntry(t=>new ye.Notice(`"${t}" is not a valid Obsidian tag name`))
regex.target: .onInvalidEntry(t=>new ye.Notice(`"${t}" 不是有效的 Obsidian 标签名称`))
